<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8">
  <title>Estro Agency — Idee che prendono forma</title>
  <style>
    * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
    body { background: #1C1C1C; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 100vh; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; }
    #__bundler_loading { position: fixed; bottom: 20px; right: 20px; font: 13px/1.4 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; color: #666; background: #fff; padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); z-index: 10000; }
    #__bundler_thumbnail { position: fixed; inset: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #1C1C1C; z-index: 9999; }
    #__bundler_thumbnail svg { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain; }
    #__bundler_placeholder { color: #999; font-size: 14px; }
  </style>
  <noscript>
    <style>#__bundler_loading { display: none; }</style>
    <div style="position:fixed;bottom:12px;left:12px;font:13px/1.4 -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,sans-serif;color:#999;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.9);padding:6px 12px;border-radius:6px;box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);z-index:10000;">
      This page requires JavaScript to display.
    </div>
  </noscript>
</head>
<body>
  <div id="__bundler_thumbnail">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 600 400" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <!-- centered cat mark -->
    <g transform="translate(170 100)">
      <rect x="20" y="30" width="220" height="170" rx="85" fill="#F3EFE0"></rect>
      <path d="M180 30 L240 -20 L250 40 Z" fill="#F3EFE0"></path>
      <path d="M30 30 L70 -20 L90 40 Z" fill="#F3EFE0"></path>
      <ellipse cx="100" cy="115" rx="12" ry="18" fill="#1C1C1C"></ellipse>
      <ellipse cx="160" cy="115" rx="12" ry="18" fill="#1C1C1C"></ellipse>
      <path d="M115 145 Q 130 160 145 145" stroke="#1C1C1C" stroke-width="6" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"></path>
      <circle cx="260" cy="60" r="14" fill="#E0185C"></circle>
    </g>
    <text x="300" y="360" text-anchor="middle" fill="#F3EFE0" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="24" font-weight="700" letter-spacing="4">ESTRO AGENCY</text>
  </svg>
</div>
  <div id="__bundler_loading">Unpacking...</div>

  <script>
    
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', async function() {
  const loading = document.getElementById('__bundler_loading');
  function setStatus(msg) { if (loading) loading.textContent = msg; }

  // Error sink persists across replaceWith since it's on window, not the DOM.
  window.addEventListener('error', function(e) {
    var p = document.body || document.documentElement;
    var d = document.getElementById('__bundler_err') || p.appendChild(document.createElement('div'));
    d.id = '__bundler_err';
    d.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;bottom:12px;left:12px;right:12px;font:12px/1.4 ui-monospace,monospace;background:#2a1215;color:#ff8a80;padding:10px 14px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #5c2b2e;z-index:99999;white-space:pre-wrap;max-height:40vh;overflow:auto';
    d.textContent = (d.textContent ? d.textContent + String.fromCharCode(10) : '') +
      '[bundle] ' + (e.message || e.type) +
      (e.filename ? ' (' + e.filename.slice(0, 60) + ':' + e.lineno + ')' : '');
  }, true);

  try {
    const manifestEl = document.querySelector('script[type="__bundler/manifest"]');
    const templateEl = document.querySelector('script[type="__bundler/template"]');
    if (!manifestEl || !templateEl) {
      setStatus('Error: missing bundle data');
      console.error('[bundler] Missing script tags — manifestEl:', !!manifestEl, 'templateEl:', !!templateEl);
      return;
    }

    const manifest = JSON.parse(manifestEl.textContent);
    let template = JSON.parse(templateEl.textContent);

    const uuids = Object.keys(manifest);
    setStatus('Unpacking ' + uuids.length + ' assets...');

    const blobUrls = {};
    await Promise.all(uuids.map(async (uuid) => {
      const entry = manifest[uuid];
      try {
        const binaryStr = atob(entry.data);
        const bytes = new Uint8Array(binaryStr.length);
        for (let i = 0; i < binaryStr.length; i++) bytes[i] = binaryStr.charCodeAt(i);

        let finalBytes = bytes;
        if (entry.compressed) {
          if (typeof DecompressionStream !== 'undefined') {
            const ds = new DecompressionStream('gzip');
            const writer = ds.writable.getWriter();
            const reader = ds.readable.getReader();
            writer.write(bytes);
            writer.close();
            const chunks = [];
            let totalLen = 0;
            while (true) {
              const { done, value } = await reader.read();
              if (done) break;
              chunks.push(value);
              totalLen += value.length;
            }
            finalBytes = new Uint8Array(totalLen);
            let offset = 0;
            for (const chunk of chunks) { finalBytes.set(chunk, offset); offset += chunk.length; }
          } else {
            console.warn('DecompressionStream not available, asset ' + uuid + ' may not render');
          }
        }

        blobUrls[uuid] = URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([finalBytes], { type: entry.mime }));
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('Failed to decode asset ' + uuid + ':', err);
        blobUrls[uuid] = URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([], { type: entry.mime }));
      }
    }));

    const extResEl = document.querySelector('script[type="__bundler/ext_resources"]');
    const extResources = extResEl ? JSON.parse(extResEl.textContent) : [];
    const resourceMap = {};
    for (const entry of extResources) {
      if (blobUrls[entry.uuid]) resourceMap[entry.id] = blobUrls[entry.uuid];
    }

    setStatus('Rendering...');
    for (const uuid of uuids) template = template.split(uuid).join(blobUrls[uuid]);

    // Strip integrity + crossorigin — blob URLs from a file:// document inherit
    // a null origin, so crossorigin forces a CORS fetch that SRI then rejects.
    // The manifest bytes are ours; SRI protects against CDN compromise, not this.
    template = template.replace(/\s+integrity="[^"]*"/gi, '').replace(/\s+crossorigin="[^"]*"/gi, '');

    const resourceScript = '<script>window.__resources = ' +
      JSON.stringify(resourceMap).split('</' + 'script>').join('<\\/' + 'script>') +
      ';</' + 'script>';
    // Inject after <head> so the DOCTYPE stays first; prepending the script
    // would push the parser into quirks mode. DOMParser always emits a <head>
    // (synthesizing one if the source HTML omitted it) but may carry
    // attributes through, so match the full opening tag. slice() rather than
    // replace() keeps us clear of $-pattern substitution in resourceScript.
    const headOpen = template.match(/<head[^>]*>/i);
    if (headOpen) {
      const i = headOpen.index + headOpen[0].length;
      template = template.slice(0, i) + resourceScript + template.slice(i);
    }

    // Parse the template and swap the root element. Scripts inserted via
    // DOMParser/replaceWith are inert per spec — re-create each with
    // createElement so they execute, awaiting onload for src scripts to
    // preserve ordering (React before ReactDOM before Babel before text/babel).
    const doc = new DOMParser().parseFromString(template, 'text/html');
    document.documentElement.replaceWith(doc.documentElement);
    const dead = Array.from(document.scripts);
    for (const old of dead) {
      const s = document.createElement('script');
      for (const a of old.attributes) s.setAttribute(a.name, a.value);
      s.textContent = old.textContent;
      // text/babel scripts with a src: fetch and inline. transformScriptTags
      // does XHR against the src, but blob:null/ from a file:// origin is
      // silently dropped. Inlining makes it a plain inline babel script,
      // which transformScriptTags handles unconditionally.
      if ((s.type === 'text/babel' || s.type === 'text/jsx') && s.src) {
        const r = await fetch(s.src);
        s.textContent = await r.text();
        s.removeAttribute('src');
      }
      const p = s.src ? new Promise(function(r) { s.onload = s.onerror = r; }) : null;
      old.replaceWith(s);
      if (p) await p;
    }
    // Babel standalone auto-transforms type=text/babel on DOMContentLoaded,
    // which fired before we swapped the document. Trigger manually if present.
    if (window.Babel && typeof window.Babel.transformScriptTags === 'function') {
      window.Babel.transformScriptTags();
    }
  } catch (err) {
    setStatus('Error unpacking: ' + err.message);
    console.error('Bundle unpack error:', err);
  }
});

  </script>

  <script type="__bundler/manifest">

*/\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'DM Sans';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 500;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"6728b47a-b366-4abf-9b6a-7f2fecd5d2ec\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0100-02BA, U+02BD-02C5, U+02C7-02CC, U+02CE-02D7, U+02DD-02FF, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+1D00-1DBF, U+1E00-1E9F, U+1EF2-1EFF, U+2020, U+20A0-20AB, U+20AD-20C0, U+2113, U+2C60-2C7F, U+A720-A7FF;\n}\n/* latin */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'DM Sans';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 500;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"1812a4fc-6912-4cf6-a25a-efec5935714f\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0000-00FF, U+0131, U+0152-0153, U+02BB-02BC, U+02C6, U+02DA, U+02DC, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+2000-206F, U+20AC, U+2122, U+2191, U+2193, U+2212, U+2215, U+FEFF, url(\"1812a4fc-6912-4cf6-a25a-efec5935714f\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0000-00FF, U+0131, U+0152-0153, U+02BB-02BC, U+02C6, U+02DA, U+02DC, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+2000-206F, U+20AC, U+2122, U+2191, U+2193, U+2212, U+2215, U+FEFF, U+FFFD;\n}\n/* latin-ext */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'DM Sans';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"6728b47a-b366-4abf-9b6a-7f2fecd5d2ec\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0100-02BA, U+02BD-02C5, U+02C7-02CC, U+02CE-02D7, U+02DD-02FF, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+1D00-1DBF, U+1E00-1E9F, U+1EF2-1EFF, U+2020, U+20A0-20AB, U+20AD-20C0, U+2113, U+2C60-2C7F, U+A720-A7FF;\n}\n/* latin */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'DM Sans';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"1812a4fc-6912-4cf6-a25a-efec5935714f\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0000-00FF, U+0131, U+0152-0153, U+02BB-02BC, U+02C6, U+02DA, U+02DC, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+2000-206F, U+20AC, U+2122, U+2191, U+2193, U+2212, U+2215, U+FEFF, U+FFFD;\n}\n/* cyrillic-ext */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'JetBrains Mono';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"2dcb3776-eb95-400d-83c6-ca1c53a1713e\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0460-052F, U+1C80-1C8A, U+20B4, U+2DE0-2DFF, U+A640-A69F, U+FE2E-FE2F;\n}\n/* cyrillic */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'JetBrains Mono';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"0f34fb78-9701-4932-88a5-9aaddba9b9b3\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0301, U+0400-045F, U+0490-0491, U+04B0-04B1, U+2116;\n}\n/* greek */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'JetBrains Mono';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"97276e2f-0ca3-463b-ad8e-6082bec482ab\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0370-0377, U+037A-037F, U+0384-038A, U+038C, U+038E-03A1, U+03A3-03FF;\n}\n/* vietnamese */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'JetBrains Mono';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"595e25dc-b508-40b6-8708-158aced642c5\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0102-0103, U+0110-0111, U+0128-0129, U+0168-0169, U+01A0-01A1, U+01AF-01B0, U+0300-0301, U+0303-0304, U+0308-0309, U+0323, U+0329, U+1EA0-1EF9, U+20AB;\n}\n/* latin-ext */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'JetBrains Mono';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"73bbfd89-30cc-4181-b70f-0e8a416557d4\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0100-02BA, U+02BD-02C5, U+02C7-02CC, U+02CE-02D7, U+02DD-02FF, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+1D00-1DBF, U+1E00-1E9F, U+1EF2-1EFF, U+2020, U+20A0-20AB, U+20AD-20C0, U+2113, U+2C60-2C7F, U+A720-A7FF;\n}\n/* latin */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'JetBrains Mono';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"e55b7c16-c5ad-4292-a53f-e1f93d5435a0\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0000-00FF, U+0131, U+0152-0153, U+02BB-02BC, U+02C6, U+02DA, U+02DC, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+2000-206F, U+20AC, U+2122, U+2191, U+2193, U+2212, U+2215, U+FEFF, U+FFFD;\n}\n/* cyrillic-ext */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'JetBrains Mono';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 500;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"2dcb3776-eb95-400d-83c6-ca1c53a1713e\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0460-052F, U+1C80-1C8A, U+20B4, U+2DE0-2DFF, U+A640-A69F, U+FE2E-FE2F;\n}\n/* cyrillic */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'JetBrains Mono';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 500;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"0f34fb78-9701-4932-88a5-9aaddba9b9b3\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0301, U+0400-045F, U+0490-0491, U+04B0-04B1, U+2116;\n}\n/* greek */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'JetBrains Mono';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 500;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"97276e2f-0ca3-463b-ad8e-6082bec482ab\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0370-0377, U+037A-037F, U+0384-038A, U+038C, U+038E-03A1, U+03A3-03FF;\n}\n/* vietnamese */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'JetBrains Mono';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 500;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"595e25dc-b508-40b6-8708-158aced642c5\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0102-0103, U+0110-0111, U+0128-0129, U+0168-0169, U+01A0-01A1, U+01AF-01B0, U+0300-0301, U+0303-0304, U+0308-0309, U+0323, U+0329, U+1EA0-1EF9, U+20AB;\n}\n/* latin-ext */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'JetBrains Mono';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 500;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"73bbfd89-30cc-4181-b70f-0e8a416557d4\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0100-02BA, U+02BD-02C5, U+02C7-02CC, U+02CE-02D7, U+02DD-02FF, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+1D00-1DBF, U+1E00-1E9F, U+1EF2-1EFF, U+2020, U+20A0-20AB, U+20AD-20C0, U+2113, U+2C60-2C7F, U+A720-A7FF;\n}\n/* latin */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'JetBrains Mono';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 500;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"e55b7c16-c5ad-4292-a53f-e1f93d5435a0\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0000-00FF, U+0131, U+0152-0153, U+02BB-02BC, U+02C6, U+02DA, U+02DC, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+2000-206F, U+20AC, U+2122, U+2191, U+2193, U+2212, U+2215, U+FEFF, U+FFFD;\n}\n/* latin-ext */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'Special Gothic Expanded One';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"48a177ca-5717-4369-9c78-0e3a765c70f5\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0100-02BA, U+02BD-02C5, U+02C7-02CC, U+02CE-02D7, U+02DD-02FF, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+1D00-1DBF, U+1E00-1E9F, U+1EF2-1EFF, U+2020, U+20A0-20AB, U+20AD-20C0, U+2113, U+2C60-2C7F, U+A720-A7FF;\n}\n/* latin */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'Special Gothic Expanded One';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"f53b2119-7976-4af7-8e0a-0303926f3aca\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0000-00FF, U+0131, U+0152-0153, U+02BB-02BC, U+02C6, U+02DA, U+02DC, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+2000-206F, U+20AC, U+2122, U+2191, U+2193, U+2212, U+2215, U+FEFF, U+FFFD;\n}\n<\u002Fstyle>\n<style>/* =================================================================\n   ESTRO · VI strict · estro.agency homepage structure\n   ================================================================= */\n\n/* ============= GLOBAL DYNAMIC LAYERS ============= */\n\n/* top scroll-progress bar */\n.progress{\n  position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;\n  height: 2px;\n  z-index: 400;\n  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04);\n  pointer-events: none;\n}\n.progress i{\n  display: block;\n  height: 100%;\n  background: linear-gradient(to right, var(--F, #E0185C), var(--Y, #E8B44A));\n  transform-origin: 0 50%;\n  transform: scaleX(0);\n  transition: transform 0.05s linear;\n  box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(224,24,92,0.6);\n}\n\n/* custom cursor */\n.curs{\n  position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0;\n  z-index: 9999;\n  pointer-events: none;\n  will-change: transform;\n}\n.curs--dot{\n  width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%;\n  background: #E0185C;\n  box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(224,24,92,0.85);\n  mix-blend-mode: difference;\n}\n.curs--ring{\n  width: 38px; height: 38px; border-radius: 50%;\n  border: 1.2px solid rgba(224,24,92,0.55);\n  transition: width 0.3s, height 0.3s, border-color 0.3s;\n  mix-blend-mode: difference;\n}\n@media (pointer: coarse){\n  .curs{ display: none; }\n}\n\n:root{\n  --K:   #1C1C1C;\n  --K2:  #141414;\n  --K3:  #0E0E0E;\n  --C:   #F3EFE0;\n  --C2:  #E8E4D5;\n  --F:   #E0185C;\n  --F2:  #8B1A4A;\n  --FH:  #c91250;\n  --Y:   #E8B44A;\n  --YW:  #F0E4C4;\n  --S:   #6D7280;\n  --W:   #FFFFFF;\n  --GR:  #4CB450;\n  --B:   #7B9FFF;\n\n  --fd: \"Special Gothic Expanded One\", \"Arial Black\", sans-serif;\n  --fb: \"DM Sans\", system-ui, sans-serif;\n  --fm: \"JetBrains Mono\", ui-monospace, monospace;\n  --fh: \"Caveat\", cursive;\n\n  --rp: 999px;\n  --rl: 32px;\n  --rm: 20px;\n  --rs: 14px;\n\n  --pad: 48px;\n  --maxw: 1320px;\n}\n\n*, *::before, *::after{ box-sizing: border-box; }\nhtml{ scroll-behavior: smooth; }\nbody{\n  margin: 0;\n  background: var(--K);\n  color: var(--C);\n  font-family: var(--fb);\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-size: 15px;\n  line-height: 1.65;\n  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;\n  text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;\n  overflow-x: hidden;\n}\nimg{ display: block; max-width: 100%; }\na{ color: inherit; text-decoration: none; }\nbutton{ font: inherit; color: inherit; background: none; border: 0; cursor: pointer; }\nem{ font-style: italic; color: var(--F); font-weight: 400; }\nb{ font-weight: 600; }\n\n::-webkit-scrollbar{ width: 6px; height: 6px; }\n::-webkit-scrollbar-track{ background: var(--K); }\n::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{ background: var(--F); border-radius: 3px; }\n\n.cn{ max-width: var(--maxw); margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 var(--pad); }\n.cn--narrow{ max-width: 980px; }\n\n.hl-pink{ color: var(--F); }\n\n/* ============= TAG ============= */\n.tag{\n  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;\n  font-family: var(--fb);\n  font-size: 10px;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  letter-spacing: 2.8px;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  color: var(--F);\n  margin-bottom: 20px;\n}\n.tag--dark{ color: rgba(28,28,28,0.6); }\n.tag--center{ display: flex; justify-content: center; }\n\n/* ============= SECTION HEAD ============= */\n.sh{ margin-bottom: 56px; }\n.sh--center{ text-align: center; }\n.sh--center .tag{ justify-content: center; }\n.sh__sub{\n  color: var(--C2);\n  opacity: 0.7;\n  font-size: 16px;\n  max-width: 560px;\n  margin: 14px 0 0;\n}\n.sh--center .sh__sub{ margin: 14px auto 0; }\n\n/* ============= HEADINGS ============= */\n.h-hero{\n  font-family: var(--fd);\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-size: clamp(40px, 4.8vw, 68px);\n  line-height: 1.02;\n  letter-spacing: -1.8px;\n  margin: 0 0 18px;\n}\n.h-hero--xl{\n  font-size: clamp(56px, 7.2vw, 112px);\n  line-height: 0.96;\n  letter-spacing: -3px;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n}\n.h-2{\n  font-family: var(--fd);\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-size: clamp(30px, 3.4vw, 46px);\n  line-height: 1.05;\n  letter-spacing: -1.2px;\n  margin: 0 0 16px;\n}\n\n/* ============= BUTTONS ============= */\n.bf, .bo, .bk{\n  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;\n  padding: 13px 22px;\n  border-radius: var(--rp);\n  font-family: var(--fb);\n  font-weight: 600;\n  font-size: 14px;\n  letter-spacing: -0.005em;\n  cursor: pointer;\n  transition: background 0.25s, transform 0.25s, border-color 0.25s, color 0.25s, box-shadow 0.25s;\n  border: 1px solid transparent;\n  white-space: nowrap;\n  text-align: left;\n}\n.btn-lg{ padding: 16px 30px; font-size: 15px; }\n.bf{\n  background: var(--F);\n  color: #fff;\n  box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(224,24,92,0.18);\n}\n.bf:hover{\n  background: var(--FH);\n  transform: translateY(-2px);\n  box-shadow: 0 14px 32px rgba(224,24,92,0.32);\n}\n.bo{\n  background: transparent;\n  border-color: rgba(243,239,224,0.22);\n  color: var(--C);\n}\n.bo:hover{\n  border-color: rgba(243,239,224,0.45);\n  background: rgba(243,239,224,0.04);\n}\n.bk{\n  background: var(--K);\n  color: var(--C);\n}\n.bk:hover{\n  background: #000;\n  transform: translateY(-2px);\n}\n.bf__chev{\n  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;\n  width: 22px; height: 22px; border-radius: 50%;\n  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.22);\n  font-size: 13px;\n  transition: transform 0.25s;\n  flex: 0 0 22px;\n}\n.bf:hover .bf__chev, .bo:hover .bf__chev, .bk:hover .bf__chev{ transform: translateX(3px); }\n.bk .bf__chev{ background: rgba(243,239,224,0.18); }\n.bo .bf__chev{ background: rgba(243,239,224,0.14); }\n\n/* =================================================================\n   HEADER\n   ================================================================= */\n.hd{\n  position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;\n  z-index: 300;\n  display: grid;\n  grid-template-columns: auto 1fr auto;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 24px;\n  padding: 16px var(--pad);\n  background: transparent;\n  transition: all 0.35s;\n}\n.hd.on{\n  background: rgba(28,28,28,0.94);\n  backdrop-filter: blur(24px);\n  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(24px);\n  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);\n}\n.hd__brand{ display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; }\n.hd__logo{ display: inline-flex; }\n.hd__name{ display: inline-flex; flex-direction: column; line-height: 1; }\n.hd__nm-1{\n  font-family: var(--fd);\n  font-size: 20px;\n  letter-spacing: -0.5px;\n  color: var(--C);\n}\n.hd__nm-2{\n  font-family: var(--fb);\n  font-size: 8px;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  letter-spacing: 2.5px;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  color: var(--S);\n  margin-top: 4px;\n}\n.hd__nav{\n  display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 24px; align-items: center;\n  font-weight: 500;\n  font-size: 13.5px;\n  color: var(--C2);\n}\n.hd__nav > a{\n  position: relative;\n  padding: 6px 0;\n  opacity: 0.78;\n  transition: opacity 0.2s, color 0.2s;\n}\n.hd__nav > a:hover{ opacity: 1; color: var(--F); }\n\n.hd__drop{ position: relative; }\n.hd__drop-btn{\n  font: inherit;\n  padding: 6px 0;\n  color: var(--C2);\n  opacity: 0.78;\n  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px;\n  transition: opacity 0.2s, color 0.2s;\n}\n.hd__drop-btn:hover{ opacity: 1; color: var(--F); }\n.hd__drop-arrow{ font-size: 9px; }\n.hd__drop-panel{\n  position: absolute;\n  top: 100%; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(8px);\n  background: rgba(20,20,20,0.96);\n  backdrop-filter: blur(24px);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);\n  border-radius: var(--rm);\n  padding: 12px;\n  min-width: 240px;\n  display: grid;\n  gap: 4px;\n  opacity: 0;\n  pointer-events: none;\n  transition: opacity 0.2s, transform 0.2s;\n  box-shadow: 0 30px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);\n  z-index: 10;\n}\n.hd__drop:hover .hd__drop-panel,\n.hd__drop:focus-within .hd__drop-panel{\n  opacity: 1;\n  pointer-events: auto;\n  transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0);\n}\n.hd__drop-panel a{\n  padding: 8px 12px;\n  border-radius: var(--rs);\n  font-size: 13px;\n  color: var(--C2);\n  transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s;\n}\n.hd__drop-panel a:hover{ background: rgba(224,24,92,0.08); color: var(--F); }\n\n.hd__cta{ display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }\n\n/* =================================================================\n   HERO\n   ================================================================= */\n.hero{\n  position: relative;\n  padding: 140px 0 80px;\n  overflow: hidden;\n  background:\n    radial-gradient(ellipse at 75% 35%, rgba(224,24,92,0.10), transparent 55%),\n    var(--K);\n}\n.hero__dots{\n  position: absolute; inset: 0;\n  background-image: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(243,239,224,0.04) 1px, transparent 1px);\n  background-size: 48px 48px;\n  pointer-events: none;\n}\n.hero__spot{\n  position: absolute;\n  top: -10%; right: -10%;\n  width: 720px; height: 720px;\n  background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(224,24,92,0.42), transparent 60%);\n  filter: blur(20px);\n  animation: spotlight 8s ease-in-out infinite;\n  pointer-events: none;\n}\n@keyframes spotlight{\n  0%, 100%{ opacity: 0.6; transform: scale(1); }\n  50%{ opacity: 1; transform: scale(1.08); }\n}\n.hero__cn{\n  position: relative;\n  display: grid;\n  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;\n  gap: 50px;\n  align-items: center;\n  min-height: 70vh;\n}\n.badge{\n  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;\n  background: rgba(224,24,92,0.14);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(224,24,92,0.32);\n  color: var(--F);\n  padding: 8px 16px;\n  border-radius: var(--rp);\n  font-size: 10px;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  letter-spacing: 2.5px;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  margin-bottom: 24px;\n}\n.badge__dot{\n  width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%;\n  background: var(--F);\n  box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(224,24,92,0.8);\n  animation: pulse 1.6s infinite;\n}\n@keyframes pulse{\n  0%, 100%{ opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }\n  50%{ opacity: 0.5; transform: scale(1.3); }\n}\n.hero__sub{\n  font-family: var(--fd);\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-size: clamp(16px, 1.5vw, 20px);\n  letter-spacing: 1px;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  margin: 0 0 14px;\n  color: var(--F);\n}\n.hero__lede{\n  color: var(--C2);\n  opacity: 0.78;\n  font-size: 16px;\n  max-width: 500px;\n  margin: 0 0 32px;\n}\n.hero__cta{ display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 12px; }\n\n/* mascot column */\n.hero__visual{\n  position: relative;\n  aspect-ratio: 5 / 4;\n  min-height: 460px;\n  display: grid;\n  place-items: center;\n}\n.hero__mascot{\n  position: relative;\n  width: 110%;\n  max-width: none;\n  height: auto;\n  z-index: 3;\n  filter:\n    drop-shadow(0 0 40px rgba(224,24,92,0.45))\n    drop-shadow(0 30px 60px rgba(224,24,92,0.18));\n  animation: flt 6s ease-in-out infinite;\n}\n.hero__mascot-glow{\n  position: absolute;\n  inset: 10% 8%;\n  background: radial-gradient(circle at 60% 50%, rgba(224,24,92,0.45), rgba(224,24,92,0.12) 35%, transparent 65%);\n  filter: blur(40px);\n  z-index: 1;\n}\n@keyframes flt{\n  0%, 100%{ transform: translateY(0); }\n  50%{ transform: translateY(-12px); }\n}\n\n/* hero telemetry lines (svg overlay between cat + quadrants) */\n.hero__lines{\n  position: absolute;\n  inset: 0;\n  width: 100%; height: 100%;\n  z-index: 2;\n  pointer-events: none;\n  opacity: 0.7;\n}\n\n/* hero data quadrants */\n.hquad{\n  position: absolute;\n  z-index: 4;\n  background: rgba(20,16,22,0.78);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(224,24,92,0.32);\n  border-radius: 14px;\n  padding: 11px 14px;\n  backdrop-filter: blur(14px) saturate(120%);\n  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(14px) saturate(120%);\n  box-shadow: 0 18px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.45), 0 0 18px rgba(224,24,92,0.15);\n  font-family: var(--fb);\n  min-width: 130px;\n  transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(.2,.7,.2,1), border-color 0.25s, box-shadow 0.3s;\n  animation: flt 6s ease-in-out infinite;\n}\n.hquad:hover{\n  transform: scale(1.06);\n  border-color: var(--F);\n  box-shadow: 0 22px 56px rgba(224,24,92,0.30);\n}\n.hquad__lbl{\n  font-family: var(--fm);\n  font-size: 9px;\n  letter-spacing: 1.8px;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  color: var(--S);\n  margin-bottom: 5px;\n}\n.hquad__big{\n  font-family: var(--fd);\n  font-size: 22px;\n  letter-spacing: -0.8px;\n  line-height: 1;\n  color: var(--C);\n  display: inline-flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 2px;\n}\n.hquad__big i{ font-style: normal; color: var(--S); font-size: 12px; margin-left: 2px; }\n.hquad__big--green{ color: var(--GR); }\n.hquad__big--gold{ color: var(--Y); }\n.hquad__sub{\n  font-family: var(--fm);\n  font-size: 9px;\n  letter-spacing: 1.2px;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  color: var(--S);\n  margin-top: 6px;\n}\n\n.hquad__gauge{\n  height: 5px;\n  background: rgba(243,239,224,0.10);\n  border-radius: 99px;\n  overflow: hidden;\n  margin-top: 8px;\n}\n.hquad__gauge span{\n  display: block;\n  height: 100%;\n  background: linear-gradient(to right, var(--F), var(--Y), var(--GR));\n  border-radius: 99px;\n  box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(76,180,80,0.6);\n  animation: gaugeFill 1.4s cubic-bezier(.2,.7,.2,1) forwards;\n  transform-origin: left;\n}\n@keyframes gaugeFill{\n  from{ transform: scaleX(0); }\n  to{ transform: scaleX(1); }\n}\n\n.hquad__spark{\n  display: block; width: 100%; height: 24px; margin-top: 6px;\n}\n\n.hquad__bars{\n  display: flex; align-items: flex-end; gap: 3px;\n  height: 22px; margin-top: 6px;\n}\n.hquad__bars i{\n  flex: 1;\n  background: linear-gradient(to top, var(--F), rgba(232,180,74,0.7));\n  border-radius: 1px;\n  height: var(--h, 50%);\n  animation: barRise 1s cubic-bezier(.2,.7,.2,1) backwards;\n}\n.hquad__bars i:nth-child(1){ animation-delay: 0.1s; }\n.hquad__bars i:nth-child(2){ animation-delay: 0.2s; }\n.hquad__bars i:nth-child(3){ animation-delay: 0.3s; }\n.hquad__bars i:nth-child(4){ animation-delay: 0.4s; }\n.hquad__bars i:nth-child(5){ animation-delay: 0.5s; }\n.hquad__bars i:nth-child(6){ animation-delay: 0.6s; }\n@keyframes barRise{\n  from{ height: 0; opacity: 0; }\n  to{ height: var(--h, 50%); opacity: 1; }\n}\n\n.hquad__pulse{\n  display: flex; gap: 4px; align-items: center;\n  margin-top: 6px;\n}\n.hquad__pulse i{\n  width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%;\n  background: var(--F);\n  box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(224,24,92,0.8);\n  animation: pulse 1.6s infinite;\n}\n.hquad__pulse i:nth-child(2){ animation-delay: 0.3s; }\n.hquad__pulse i:nth-child(3){ animation-delay: 0.6s; }\n\n/* position the 4 corner quadrants */\n.hquad--tl{ top: 4%;  left: -2%;  animation-delay: 0s; }\n.hquad--tr{ top: 6%;  right: -3%; animation-delay: 0.4s; }\n.hquad--bl{ bottom: 8%; left: -1%; animation-delay: 0.8s; }\n.hquad--br{ bottom: 10%; right: -2%; animation-delay: 1.2s; }\n\n/* top center LIVE indicator */\n.hquad--live{\n  top: -8px; left: 50%;\n  transform: translateX(-50%);\n  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;\n  padding: 6px 12px;\n  font-family: var(--fm);\n  font-size: 9px;\n  letter-spacing: 2px;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  color: var(--F);\n  background: rgba(20,16,22,0.85);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(224,24,92,0.4);\n  border-radius: 99px;\n  min-width: auto;\n  animation: none;\n}\n.hquad--live:hover{ transform: translateX(-50%) scale(1.05); }\n.hquad__live-dot{\n  width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%;\n  background: var(--F);\n  box-shadow: 0 0 8px var(--F);\n  animation: pulse 1.4s infinite;\n}\n\n/* =================================================================\n   SERVIZI (DARK)\n   ================================================================= */\n.services{\n  padding: 100px 0;\n  background: var(--K);\n}\n.svc{\n  display: grid;\n  grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr);\n  gap: 12px;\n}\n.svc__c{\n  position: relative;\n  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.025);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);\n  border-radius: var(--rm);\n  padding: 28px 22px 24px;\n  min-height: 240px;\n  display: flex; flex-direction: column;\n  transition: transform 0.3s, border-color 0.3s, background 0.3s;\n  overflow: hidden;\n}\n.svc__c::before{\n  content: \"\";\n  position: absolute;\n  inset: -1px;\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--F) 0%, transparent 50%);\n  opacity: 0;\n  border-radius: var(--rm);\n  z-index: -1;\n  transition: opacity 0.3s;\n}\n.svc__c:hover{\n  transform: translateY(-4px);\n  border-color: rgba(224,24,92,0.32);\n  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.045);\n}\n.svc__num{\n  position: absolute;\n  top: 20px;\n  right: 22px;\n  font-family: var(--fd);\n  font-size: 14px;\n  letter-spacing: -0.4px;\n  color: var(--F);\n  line-height: 1;\n  z-index: 2;\n}\n.svc__ill{\n  height: 90px;\n  margin: 8px 0 22px;\n  color: var(--C);\n  display: flex; align-items: center;\n  position: relative;\n}\n.svc__ill svg{\n  max-height: 100%;\n  width: auto;\n  filter: drop-shadow(0 0 18px rgba(224,24,92,0.25));\n  transition: transform 0.3s;\n}\n.svc__c:hover .svc__ill svg{ transform: translateY(-2px) scale(1.04); }\n.svc__c h3{\n  font-family: var(--fd);\n  font-size: 15px;\n  font-weight: 400;\n  letter-spacing: -0.3px;\n  line-height: 1.18;\n  margin: 0 0 12px;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n}\n.svc__c p{\n  font-size: 13px;\n  line-height: 1.55;\n  color: var(--C2);\n  opacity: 0.72;\n  margin: 0;\n}\n.svc__c p b{ color: var(--C); opacity: 1; }\n\n/* =================================================================\n   SHOWREEL (DARK)\n   ================================================================= */\n.reel{\n  padding: 100px 0;\n  background: var(--K);\n}\n.reel__h{ margin-bottom: 48px; }\n.reel__player{\n  position: relative;\n  border: 1px solid rgba(224,24,92,0.22);\n  border-radius: var(--rl);\n  overflow: hidden;\n  box-shadow:\n    0 30px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.5),\n    0 0 80px rgba(224,24,92,0.10);\n}\n.reel__ph{\n  position: relative;\n  aspect-ratio: 16 / 9;\n  background:\n    radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, rgba(224,24,92,0.16), transparent 60%),\n    linear-gradient(135deg, #2A0E1A 0%, #08060a 100%);\n  display: grid; place-items: center;\n  overflow: hidden;\n}\n.reel__stripes{\n  position: absolute; inset: 0;\n  background: repeating-linear-gradient(\n    -25deg,\n    transparent 0,\n    transparent 60px,\n    rgba(224,24,92,0.06) 60px,\n    rgba(224,24,92,0.06) 62px\n  );\n}\n.reel__play{\n  position: relative; z-index: 2;\n  color: var(--F);\n  filter: drop-shadow(0 0 30px rgba(224,24,92,0.55));\n  transition: transform 0.3s;\n  display: grid; place-items: center; gap: 14px;\n  text-align: center;\n}\n.reel__play:hover{ transform: scale(1.05); }\n.reel__play-lbl{\n  font-family: var(--fd);\n  font-size: 12px;\n  letter-spacing: 3px;\n  color: var(--C);\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n}\n.reel__hud{\n  position: absolute;\n  top: 20px; left: 24px;\n  display: flex; gap: 22px;\n  z-index: 2;\n  font-family: var(--fm);\n  font-size: 11px;\n  letter-spacing: 0.5px;\n}\n.reel__hud span:first-child{\n  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;\n  color: var(--F);\n}\n.reel__hud span:not(:first-child){ color: rgba(243,239,224,0.45); }\n.reel__rec{\n  width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%;\n  background: var(--F); box-shadow: 0 0 8px var(--F);\n  animation: pulse 1.6s infinite;\n}\n.reel__caption{\n  position: absolute;\n  bottom: 20px; right: 24px;\n  font-family: var(--fm);\n  font-size: 11px;\n  color: rgba(243,239,224,0.4);\n  z-index: 2;\n}\n\n/* =================================================================\n   ABOUT (CREAM)\n   ================================================================= */\n.about{\n  background: var(--C);\n  color: var(--K);\n  padding: 120px 0;\n  position: relative;\n  overflow: hidden;\n}\n.about__tail{\n  position: absolute;\n  left: -80px; top: -20px;\n  width: 360px; height: 540px;\n  opacity: 0.18;\n  pointer-events: none;\n  z-index: 0;\n}\n.about__cn{\n  position: relative;\n  z-index: 1;\n  display: grid;\n  grid-template-columns: 1.05fr 1fr;\n  gap: 70px;\n  align-items: center;\n}\n.about__kicker{\n  font-family: var(--fd);\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-size: clamp(16px, 1.6vw, 22px);\n  letter-spacing: 1px;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  color: var(--K);\n  margin: 0 0 18px;\n  line-height: 1.15;\n}\n.about__title em{ color: var(--F); }\n.about__copy p{\n  color: rgba(28,28,28,0.72);\n  font-size: 15.5px;\n  max-width: 540px;\n  margin: 0 0 14px;\n}\n.about__copy p b{ color: var(--K); }\n.about__btn{ margin-top: 18px; }\n\n.about__visual{\n  position: relative;\n}\n.abphoto{\n  position: relative;\n  aspect-ratio: 4 / 5;\n  border-radius: var(--rl);\n  background:\n    repeating-linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(28,28,28,0.04) 0 12px, transparent 12px 24px),\n    linear-gradient(135deg, #E0185C22 0%, #E0185C11 100%);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(28,28,28,0.10);\n  overflow: hidden;\n  display: grid; place-items: center;\n}\n.abphoto__inner{\n  text-align: center;\n  color: rgba(28,28,28,0.4);\n}\n.abphoto__ico{ color: rgba(28,28,28,0.35); margin: 0 auto; }\n.abphoto__lbl{\n  display: block;\n  font-family: var(--fm);\n  font-size: 11px;\n  letter-spacing: 2px;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  margin-bottom: 18px;\n}\n\n.abstats{\n  position: absolute;\n  bottom: -28px; left: -16px; right: -16px;\n  display: grid;\n  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;\n  gap: 8px;\n}\n.abstat{\n  background: var(--K);\n  color: var(--C);\n  padding: 16px 14px;\n  border-radius: var(--rm);\n  text-align: center;\n  box-shadow: 0 16px 40px rgba(28,28,28,0.18);\n}\n.abstat__num{\n  font-family: var(--fd);\n  font-size: 30px;\n  letter-spacing: -1px;\n  line-height: 1;\n  margin-bottom: 4px;\n}\n.abstat__num--pink{ color: var(--F); }\n.abstat__lbl{\n  font-size: 10px;\n  letter-spacing: 2px;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  color: rgba(243,239,224,0.55);\n  font-weight: 600;\n}\n\n/* =================================================================\n   CLIENTS (DARK)\n   ================================================================= */\n.clients{\n  background: var(--K);\n  padding: 100px 0;\n}\n.clients .tag{ margin-bottom: 40px; }\n.cmq{\n  border-top: 1px solid rgba(243,239,224,0.06);\n  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(243,239,224,0.06);\n  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(224,24,92,0.04), transparent);\n  overflow: hidden;\n  padding: 28px 0;\n  margin-bottom: 12px;\n  position: relative;\n}\n.cmq::before, .cmq::after{\n  content: \"\"; position: absolute; top: 0; bottom: 0; width: 120px;\n  z-index: 2; pointer-events: none;\n}\n.cmq::before{ left: 0; background: linear-gradient(to right, var(--K), transparent); }\n.cmq::after{ right: 0; background: linear-gradient(to left, var(--K), transparent); }\n.cmq:last-child{ margin-bottom: 0; }\n.cmq__track{\n  display: inline-flex; gap: 64px; align-items: center;\n  white-space: nowrap;\n  animation: mqs 60s linear infinite;\n  will-change: transform;\n}\n.cmq--rev .cmq__track{ animation-direction: reverse; animation-duration: 70s; }\n.logo{\n  display: inline-flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  height: 68px;\n  flex: 0 0 auto;\n  padding: 0 8px;\n}\n.logo img{\n  max-height: 100%;\n  max-width: 180px;\n  width: auto;\n  height: auto;\n  object-fit: contain;\n  filter: brightness(0) invert(1);\n  opacity: 0.72;\n  transition: opacity 0.25s, filter 0.25s, transform 0.25s;\n}\n.logo:hover img{\n  opacity: 1;\n  /* recolor to magenta on hover */\n  filter:\n    brightness(0)\n    invert(38%) sepia(95%) saturate(4200%) hue-rotate(326deg) brightness(95%) contrast(95%);\n  transform: scale(1.06);\n}\n@keyframes mqs{\n  from{ transform: translateX(0); }\n  to{ transform: translateX(-50%); }\n}\n\n/* =================================================================\n   CASE STUDIES (DARK)\n   ================================================================= */\n.cs{\n  background: var(--K);\n  padding: 100px 0 120px;\n}\n.cs__grid{\n  display: grid;\n  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);\n  gap: 18px;\n  max-width: var(--maxw);\n  margin: 0 auto;\n}\n.csc{\n  display: flex; flex-direction: column;\n  gap: 14px;\n  position: relative;\n  transition: transform 0.3s;\n}\n.csc:hover{ transform: translateY(-4px); }\n.csc__thumb{\n  position: relative;\n  aspect-ratio: 4 / 3;\n  border-radius: var(--rm);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);\n  overflow: hidden;\n  display: grid; place-items: center;\n  transition: border-color 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;\n}\n.csc:hover .csc__thumb{\n  border-color: rgba(224,24,92,0.4);\n  box-shadow: 0 18px 50px rgba(224,24,92,0.18);\n}\n.csc__pattern{\n  position: absolute; inset: 0;\n  pointer-events: none;\n}\n.csc__logo{\n  position: relative;\n  z-index: 2;\n  max-width: 60%;\n  max-height: 50%;\n  width: auto; height: auto;\n  object-fit: contain;\n  filter: brightness(0) invert(1);\n  opacity: 0.92;\n  transition: transform 0.3s;\n}\n.csc__logo--lg{ max-width: 72%; max-height: 60%; }\n.csc:hover .csc__logo{ transform: scale(1.06); }\n\n.csc__wm{\n  position: relative;\n  z-index: 2;\n  font-family: var(--fd);\n  font-size: clamp(20px, 2vw, 28px);\n  letter-spacing: -0.6px;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.95);\n  text-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);\n  text-align: center;\n  padding: 0 14px;\n  line-height: 1.05;\n  transition: transform 0.3s;\n}\n.csc:hover .csc__wm{ transform: scale(1.04); }\n.csc__wm i{ font-style: italic; color: var(--F); font-weight: 400; }\n.csc__wm--mono{ font-family: var(--fm); font-weight: 500; }\n.csc__wm--script{\n  font-family: var(--fh);\n  font-size: clamp(28px, 2.6vw, 38px);\n  letter-spacing: 0;\n  text-transform: none;\n}\n.csc__wm--sans{ font-family: var(--fb); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.5px; }\n\n.csc__meta{ padding: 0 4px; }\n.csc__chip{\n  display: inline-block;\n  font-size: 10px;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  letter-spacing: 2px;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  color: var(--F);\n  background: rgba(224,24,92,0.10);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(224,24,92,0.32);\n  padding: 4px 10px;\n  border-radius: var(--rp);\n  margin-bottom: 8px;\n}\n.csc h3{\n  font-family: var(--fd);\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-size: 17px;\n  letter-spacing: -0.4px;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  margin: 0 0 4px;\n  color: var(--C);\n}\n.csc p{\n  font-size: 12.5px;\n  color: var(--C2);\n  opacity: 0.6;\n  margin: 0;\n  line-height: 1.45;\n}\n\n/* Per-brand thumb backgrounds (placeholder moodboards) */\n.csc__thumb--abc       { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2A1A0E 0%, #1C1208 100%); }\n.csc__thumb--artigli   { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2E0808 0%, #5A0F1A 100%); }\n.csc__thumb--cybergon  { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #07172C 0%, #0E2645 100%); }\n.csc__thumb--coseacasa { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2A1F12 0%, #4A3318 100%); }\n.csc__thumb--dresso    { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1E0712 0%, #3D0E29 100%); }\n.csc__thumb--squarelife{ background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0E2418 0%, #1B3826 100%); }\n.csc__thumb--disclaimer{ background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1A0A12 0%, #2C1220 100%); }\n.csc__thumb--pyrex     { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #06222A 0%, #0F4554 100%); }\n.csc__thumb--fragi     { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2A0E2A 0%, #4E1838 60%, #3C1518 100%); }\n.csc__thumb--favola    { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1A0F2E 0%, #3D1C5A 100%); }\n.csc__thumb--redbull   { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1A0F2A 0%, #401824 100%); }\n.csc__thumb--woodoo    { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0E0820 0%, #2A1645 100%); }\n\n/* Per-brand pattern overlays */\n.csc__pattern--claws{\n  background:\n    radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 90%, rgba(224,24,92,0.3), transparent 50%),\n    radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 10%, rgba(255,80,80,0.18), transparent 50%);\n}\n.csc__pattern--grid{\n  background-image:\n    linear-gradient(rgba(123,159,255,0.18) 1px, transparent 1px),\n    linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(123,159,255,0.18) 1px, transparent 1px);\n  background-size: 18px 18px;\n  mask-image: radial-gradient(circle at center, #000 30%, transparent 75%);\n  -webkit-mask-image: radial-gradient(circle at center, #000 30%, transparent 75%);\n}\n.csc__pattern--dots{\n  background-image: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(232,180,74,0.35) 1.5px, transparent 1.5px);\n  background-size: 18px 18px;\n}\n.csc__pattern--stripes{\n  background: repeating-linear-gradient(45deg, transparent 0, transparent 18px, rgba(224,24,92,0.10) 18px, rgba(224,24,92,0.10) 20px);\n}\n.csc__pattern--squares{\n  background-image:\n    linear-gradient(rgba(124,169,130,0.18) 1px, transparent 1px),\n    linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(124,169,130,0.18) 1px, transparent 1px);\n  background-size: 32px 32px;\n}\n.csc__pattern--grunge{\n  background:\n    radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 30%, rgba(255,255,255,0.05), transparent 50%),\n    radial-gradient(ellipse at 70% 70%, rgba(224,24,92,0.18), transparent 50%);\n}\n.csc__pattern--glass{\n  background:\n    radial-gradient(circle at 20% 30%, rgba(0,200,220,0.22), transparent 45%),\n    radial-gradient(circle at 80% 70%, rgba(255,255,255,0.10), transparent 50%);\n}\n.csc__pattern--gradient{\n  background:\n    conic-gradient(from 200deg at 50% 50%, rgba(232,180,74,0.20), rgba(224,24,92,0.18), rgba(123,159,255,0.20), rgba(232,180,74,0.20));\n  filter: blur(20px);\n  transform: scale(1.1);\n}\n.csc__pattern--sparkle{\n  background:\n    radial-gradient(circle at 25% 30%, rgba(232,180,74,0.30), transparent 30%),\n    radial-gradient(circle at 75% 60%, rgba(232,180,74,0.22), transparent 35%),\n    radial-gradient(circle at 50% 85%, rgba(232,180,74,0.18), transparent 30%);\n}\n.csc__pattern--energy{\n  background:\n    conic-gradient(from 180deg at 50% 50%, rgba(255,80,40,0.30), rgba(255,200,40,0.22), rgba(40,80,255,0.18), rgba(255,80,40,0.30));\n  filter: blur(28px);\n  transform: scale(1.2);\n}\n.csc__pattern--ritual{\n  background:\n    radial-gradient(circle at center, rgba(155,126,189,0.25), transparent 55%),\n    repeating-conic-gradient(from 0deg at 50% 50%, transparent 0deg, rgba(155,126,189,0.06) 6deg, transparent 12deg);\n}\n\n/* =================================================================\n   CAFFÈ BANNER (BEIGE)\n   ================================================================= */\n.cbn{\n  background: var(--YW);\n  color: var(--K);\n  padding: 100px 0 110px;\n  position: relative;\n  overflow: hidden;\n}\n.cbn__cn{\n  position: relative;\n  text-align: center;\n}\n.cbn__paw{\n  position: absolute;\n  right: 4%; top: -20px;\n  width: 180px; height: 180px;\n  opacity: 0.16;\n  transform: rotate(-12deg);\n  pointer-events: none;\n}\n.cbn__t{\n  font-family: var(--fd);\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-size: clamp(36px, 5vw, 70px);\n  line-height: 1.05;\n  letter-spacing: -1.5px;\n  margin: 0 0 36px;\n  color: var(--K);\n}\n.cbn__t em{ color: var(--F); font-style: italic; }\n\n/* =================================================================\n   BLOG (DARK)\n   ================================================================= */\n.blog{\n  background: var(--K);\n  padding: 110px 0;\n}\n.bgrid{\n  display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 20px;\n}\n.post{\n  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);\n  border-radius: var(--rm);\n  overflow: hidden;\n  transition: transform 0.3s, border-color 0.3s;\n}\n.post:hover{\n  transform: translateY(-4px);\n  border-color: rgba(224,24,92,0.32);\n}\n.post__th{\n  position: relative;\n  aspect-ratio: 5 / 3;\n  display: grid; place-items: center;\n  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04);\n  overflow: hidden;\n}\n.post__art{\n  position: absolute;\n  inset: 0;\n  width: 100%;\n  height: 100%;\n  z-index: 1;\n  display: block;\n}\n.post__pattern{\n  position: absolute; inset: 0;\n  pointer-events: none;\n  z-index: 2;\n  opacity: 0.5;\n}\n.post__chip{\n  z-index: 3;\n}\n.post__th--a{\n  background:\n    radial-gradient(circle at 30% 30%, rgba(224,24,92,0.18), transparent 60%),\n    linear-gradient(135deg, #221016, var(--K));\n}\n.post__th--b{\n  background:\n    repeating-linear-gradient(45deg, transparent 0, transparent 14px, rgba(224,24,92,0.07) 14px, rgba(224,24,92,0.07) 16px),\n    linear-gradient(135deg, #1a141f, var(--K));\n}\n.post__th--c{\n  background:\n    radial-gradient(circle at 70% 70%, rgba(232,180,74,0.18), transparent 60%),\n    linear-gradient(135deg, #20180e, var(--K));\n}\n.post__chip{\n  position: absolute; top: 14px; left: 14px;\n  font-size: 10px;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  letter-spacing: 2px;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  color: var(--F);\n  background: rgba(28,28,28,0.7);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(224,24,92,0.32);\n  padding: 5px 10px;\n  border-radius: var(--rp);\n  backdrop-filter: blur(8px);\n}\n.post__ico{ color: var(--F); opacity: 0.75; }\n.post__body{ padding: 22px 24px 26px; }\n.post__date{\n  font-family: var(--fm);\n  font-size: 10px;\n  letter-spacing: 2px;\n  color: var(--S);\n  margin-bottom: 10px;\n}\n.post h3{\n  font-family: var(--fd);\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-size: 17px;\n  letter-spacing: -0.4px;\n  line-height: 1.2;\n  margin: 0 0 12px;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n}\n.post p{\n  font-size: 13.5px;\n  color: var(--C2);\n  opacity: 0.65;\n  margin: 0 0 18px;\n}\n.post__link{\n  font-family: var(--fb);\n  font-weight: 600;\n  font-size: 13px;\n  color: var(--F);\n}\n.post__link:hover{ color: var(--FH); }\n\n/* =================================================================\n   CONTATTI (CREAM)\n   ================================================================= */\n.contact{\n  background: var(--C);\n  color: var(--K);\n  padding: 130px 0 110px;\n  position: relative;\n  overflow: hidden;\n}\n.contact__pet{\n  position: absolute;\n  right: -90px; top: -30px;\n  width: 380px;\n  pointer-events: none;\n  opacity: 0.18;\n  transform: rotate(-8deg);\n  filter: hue-rotate(0deg);\n}\n.contact__pet img{ width: 100%; height: auto; }\n.contact__cn{\n  position: relative;\n  display: grid;\n  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.2fr;\n  gap: 60px;\n  align-items: start;\n}\n.contact__head{ padding-top: 8px; }\n.contact__title em{ color: var(--F); font-style: italic; }\n.contact__lede{\n  color: rgba(28,28,28,0.65);\n  font-size: 16px;\n  max-width: 440px;\n}\n.contact__lede a{ color: var(--F); font-weight: 600; }\n\n.cform{\n  background: #fff;\n  border-radius: var(--rl);\n  padding: 34px;\n  box-shadow: 0 30px 60px rgba(28,28,28,0.10);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(28,28,28,0.06);\n}\n.cform__head{\n  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;\n  padding-bottom: 16px;\n  margin-bottom: 18px;\n  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(28,28,28,0.08);\n  font-family: var(--fm);\n  font-size: 11px;\n  letter-spacing: 1.5px;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  color: var(--F);\n}\n.cform__head-dot{\n  width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%;\n  background: var(--F);\n  box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(224,24,92,0.5);\n  animation: pulse 1.6s infinite;\n}\n.cform__row{\n  display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 12px;\n  margin-bottom: 12px;\n}\n.cform__full{ display: block; margin-bottom: 12px; }\n.cform label > span{\n  display: block;\n  font-size: 11px;\n  letter-spacing: 1.5px;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  color: rgba(28,28,28,0.55);\n  font-weight: 600;\n  margin-bottom: 6px;\n}\n.cform input, .cform textarea{\n  width: 100%;\n  background: #fff;\n  border: 1px solid rgba(28,28,28,0.14);\n  border-radius: var(--rs);\n  padding: 12px 14px;\n  font-family: var(--fb);\n  font-size: 14px;\n  color: var(--K);\n  transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;\n}\n.cform input:focus, .cform textarea:focus{\n  outline: 0;\n  border-color: var(--F);\n  box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(224,24,92,0.10);\n}\n.cform textarea{ resize: vertical; min-height: 100px; }\n.cform__check{\n  display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 10px;\n  margin: 12px 0 18px;\n  font-size: 12.5px;\n  color: rgba(28,28,28,0.65);\n}\n.cform__check input{ width: auto; margin-top: 3px; accent-color: var(--F); }\n.cform__check a{ color: var(--F); font-weight: 600; }\n.cform__submit{ width: 100%; justify-content: center; }\n.cform__ok{\n  display: none;\n  margin-top: 14px;\n  padding: 12px 14px;\n  background: rgba(76,180,80,0.08);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(76,180,80,0.32);\n  border-radius: var(--rs);\n  color: #3a9c3e;\n  font-size: 13px;\n}\n.cform__ok.show{ display: block; }\n\n/* =================================================================\n   FAQ (DARK) — categorized\n   ================================================================= */\n.faq{\n  background: var(--K);\n  padding: 110px 0;\n}\n.faq__cats{\n  display: grid;\n  gap: 36px;\n  margin-top: 24px;\n}\n.faq__cat-t{\n  font-family: var(--fb);\n  font-weight: 600;\n  font-size: 11px;\n  letter-spacing: 3px;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  color: var(--F);\n  margin: 0 0 14px;\n  padding-bottom: 12px;\n  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(224,24,92,0.22);\n}\n.faq__list{ display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; }\n.faq details{\n  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.025);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);\n  border-radius: var(--rs);\n  transition: border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s;\n  overflow: hidden;\n}\n.faq details[open]{\n  border-color: rgba(224,24,92,0.32);\n  background: rgba(224,24,92,0.04);\n}\n.faq summary{\n  list-style: none;\n  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 18px;\n  padding: 16px 22px;\n  font-family: var(--fd);\n  font-size: 13px;\n  font-weight: 400;\n  letter-spacing: -0.2px;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  cursor: pointer;\n  line-height: 1.3;\n}\n.faq summary::-webkit-details-marker{ display: none; }\n.faq__chev{\n  margin-left: auto;\n  font-style: normal;\n  color: var(--F);\n  font-size: 22px;\n  font-family: var(--fb);\n  font-weight: 300;\n  line-height: 1;\n  transition: transform 0.3s;\n  flex: 0 0 22px;\n}\n.faq details[open] .faq__chev{ transform: rotate(45deg); }\n.faq p{\n  margin: 0;\n  padding: 0 22px 22px;\n  font-size: 14px;\n  color: var(--C2);\n  opacity: 0.72;\n}\n.faq p b{ color: var(--C); opacity: 1; }\n.faq p em{ color: var(--F); font-style: italic; }\n\n/* =================================================================\n   PARTNERS (DARK)\n   ================================================================= */\n.partners{\n  background: var(--K);\n  padding: 80px 0 100px;\n  border-top: 1px solid rgba(243,239,224,0.06);\n}\n.partners .tag{ display: flex; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 32px; }\n.mp__lbl{ margin-top: 60px; }\n.prow{\n  display: grid;\n  grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr);\n  gap: 14px;\n  max-width: 1200px;\n  margin: 0 auto;\n}\n.prow--mp{\n  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);\n  max-width: 600px;\n}\n.prt{\n  border: 1px solid rgba(243,239,224,0.10);\n  border-radius: var(--rm);\n  padding: 22px 18px;\n  background: var(--C);\n  text-align: center;\n  font-family: var(--fd);\n  font-size: 15px;\n  letter-spacing: -0.4px;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  line-height: 1.15;\n  color: var(--K);\n  transition: border-color 0.25s, transform 0.25s, box-shadow 0.25s;\n  display: grid;\n  place-items: center;\n  min-height: 140px;\n}\n.prt:hover{\n  border-color: var(--F);\n  transform: translateY(-3px);\n  box-shadow: 0 14px 36px rgba(224,24,92,0.18);\n}\n.prt em{\n  display: block;\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-family: var(--fb);\n  font-size: 9px;\n  letter-spacing: 2.5px;\n  color: var(--S);\n  margin-top: 6px;\n}\n.prt--img{ padding: 22px; }\n.prt--img img{\n  max-width: 100%;\n  max-height: 62px;\n  width: auto;\n  height: auto;\n  object-fit: contain;\n  transition: transform 0.25s;\n}\n.prt--img:hover img{ transform: scale(1.04); }\n\n/* All logos are pre-cropped tight to their mark (see assets/partners/*.png),\n   so a single max-height rule keeps them visually balanced — 24 ORE remains\n   the implicit reference because it has the widest aspect (3.21:1). */\n\n.prt--mp{ min-height: 150px; padding: 26px; }\n.prt--mp img{ max-height: 56px; }\n\n/* =================================================================\n   REVEAL\n   ================================================================= */\n.rv{\n  opacity: 0;\n  transform: translateY(28px);\n  transition: opacity 0.7s ease, transform 0.7s cubic-bezier(.2,.7,.2,1);\n}\n.rv.in{ opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }\n.rv.d1{ transition-delay: 100ms; }\n.rv.d2{ transition-delay: 200ms; }\n.rv.d3{ transition-delay: 300ms; }\n\n/* =================================================================\n   FOOTER\n   ================================================================= */\n.ft{\n  background: var(--K3);\n  padding: 80px 0 24px;\n  border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04);\n}\n.ft__cn{\n  display: grid;\n  grid-template-columns: 1.4fr 1.2fr 1.1fr 1fr;\n  gap: 40px;\n}\n.ft__brand p{\n  color: rgba(243,239,224,0.55);\n  font-size: 14px;\n  margin: 16px 0 18px;\n  max-width: 280px;\n}\n.ft__company{\n  font-size: 12px;\n  color: rgba(243,239,224,0.45);\n  line-height: 1.6;\n}\n.ft__company strong{ color: var(--C); font-weight: 600; }\n.ft__col{ display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; }\n.ft__col h5{\n  font-size: 10px;\n  letter-spacing: 2.5px;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  color: var(--S);\n  margin: 0 0 6px;\n  font-weight: 600;\n}\n.ft__col a{\n  color: rgba(243,239,224,0.4);\n  font-size: 13.5px;\n  transition: color 0.2s;\n}\n.ft__col a:hover{ color: var(--C); }\n.ft__loc{ margin-bottom: 4px; }\n.ft__loc-t{\n  display: block;\n  font-family: var(--fd);\n  font-size: 12px;\n  letter-spacing: -0.2px;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  color: var(--C);\n  margin-bottom: 4px;\n}\n.ft__loc a{ line-height: 1.5; display: block; }\n.ft__job{\n  margin-top: 12px;\n  color: var(--F) !important;\n  font-weight: 600;\n}\n.ft__phone, .ft__email{\n  display: block;\n  font-family: var(--fd);\n  font-size: 15px;\n  letter-spacing: -0.4px;\n  color: var(--C) !important;\n  margin-top: 8px;\n}\n.ft__email{ color: var(--F) !important; }\n.ft__social{ display: flex; gap: 10px; margin: 8px 0 12px; }\n.ft__social a{\n  width: 36px; height: 36px;\n  border-radius: 50%;\n  border: 1px solid rgba(243,239,224,0.10);\n  display: grid; place-items: center;\n  color: rgba(243,239,224,0.5);\n}\n.ft__social a:hover{\n  color: var(--F);\n  border-color: rgba(224,24,92,0.32);\n  background: rgba(224,24,92,0.04);\n}\n.ft__bot{\n  max-width: var(--maxw);\n  margin: 50px auto 0;\n  padding: 22px var(--pad) 0;\n  border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);\n  display: flex; justify-content: space-between; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 12px;\n  font-size: 11px;\n  color: rgba(243,239,224,0.3);\n}\n.ft__bot a{ color: rgba(243,239,224,0.5); }\n\n/* =================================================================\n   DYNAMIC EFFECTS — tilt, glow, caret, pause, spotlight, playing\n   ================================================================= */\n\n/* service cards prep for 3D tilt */\n.svc__c{\n  transform-style: preserve-3d;\n  transition: transform 0.18s cubic-bezier(.2,.7,.2,1), border-color 0.3s, background 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;\n}\n.svc__c::after{\n  content: \"\";\n  position: absolute; inset: 0;\n  border-radius: var(--rm);\n  background: radial-gradient(circle 200px at var(--mx, 50%) var(--my, 50%), rgba(224,24,92,0.20), transparent 60%);\n  opacity: 0;\n  pointer-events: none;\n  transition: opacity 0.3s;\n  z-index: 0;\n}\n.svc__c:hover::after{ opacity: 1; }\n.svc__c > *{ position: relative; z-index: 1; }\n\n/* case-study thumb tilt smoothing */\n.csc__thumb{\n  transform-style: preserve-3d;\n  transition: transform 0.18s cubic-bezier(.2,.7,.2,1), border-color 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;\n}\n\n/* magnetic button smoothing */\n.bf, .bo, .reel__play{\n  transition: transform 0.18s cubic-bezier(.2,.7,.2,1), background 0.25s, color 0.25s, box-shadow 0.25s, border-color 0.25s;\n}\n\n/* clients marquee — pause on hover */\n.cmq--paused .cmq__track{ animation-play-state: paused; }\n.logo{ transition: transform 0.25s; cursor: pointer; }\n.logo:hover{ transform: scale(1.08); }\n\n/* code-editor typewriter caret */\n.codew__caret{\n  display: inline-block;\n  color: var(--F);\n  opacity: 0.8;\n}\n.codew__caret--blink{ animation: caretBlink 1s steps(2) infinite; }\n@keyframes caretBlink{ 50%{ opacity: 0; } }\n\n/* showreel \"playing\" state — hide play button, show fake scrubbing UI */\n.reel__ph--playing .reel__play{ opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.8); pointer-events: none; }\n.reel__ph--playing .reel__stripes{ animation: stripeShift 8s linear infinite; }\n@keyframes stripeShift{\n  from{ background-position: 0 0; }\n  to{ background-position: 600px 0; }\n}\n.reel__play{ transition: opacity 0.35s, transform 0.35s; }\n\n/* caffè banner — cursor spotlight */\n.cbn{\n  --mx: 50%; --my: 50%;\n}\n.cbn::before{\n  content: \"\";\n  position: absolute; inset: 0;\n  background: radial-gradient(circle 280px at var(--mx) var(--my), rgba(224,24,92,0.18), transparent 65%);\n  pointer-events: none;\n  transition: opacity 0.25s;\n  opacity: 0.9;\n}\n.cbn__cn{ z-index: 1; }\n\n/* method steps — number micro animation on hover */\n.step__num{ position: relative; }\n.step__num::before{\n  content: \"\";\n  position: absolute; inset: -6px;\n  border-radius: 50%;\n  border: 1px solid rgba(224,24,92,0.4);\n  opacity: 0;\n  transform: scale(0.8);\n  transition: opacity 0.3s, transform 0.4s;\n}\n.step:hover .step__num::before{ opacity: 1; transform: scale(1.1); }\n\n/* faq smooth open */\n.faq details summary{ transition: background 0.25s; }\n.faq details[open] summary{ background: rgba(224,24,92,0.04); }\n\n/* partners — gentle lift on hover (already there) — add float */\n.prt{ transition: border-color 0.25s, transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(.2,.7,.2,1), box-shadow 0.3s; }\n\n/* footer social — hover wiggle */\n.ft__social a{ transition: color 0.2s, border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s, transform 0.25s; }\n.ft__social a:hover{ transform: translateY(-3px) rotate(-4deg); }\n\n/* page reveal helper */\n@keyframes floatY{\n  0%, 100%{ transform: translateY(0); }\n  50%{ transform: translateY(-8px); }\n}\n\n/* =================================================================\n   RESPONSIVE\n   ================================================================= */\n@media (max-width: 1200px){\n  .svc{ grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); }\n  .cs__grid{ grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); }\n}\n@media (max-width: 1100px){\n  :root{ --pad: 32px; }\n  .hnav{ display: none; }\n  .hero__cn{ grid-template-columns: 1fr; }\n  .hero__visual{ min-height: 380px; }\n  .svc{ grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); }\n  .about__cn{ grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 60px; }\n  .about__tail{ width: 240px; height: 360px; }\n  .cs__grid{ grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); }\n  .bgrid{ grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }\n  .contact__cn{ grid-template-columns: 1fr; }\n  .contact__pet{ display: none; }\n  .prow{ grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); }\n  .ft__cn{ grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }\n}\n@media (max-width: 720px){\n  :root{ --pad: 20px; }\n  .hquad{ display: none; }\n  .hquad--live{ display: inline-flex; }\n  .h-hero--xl{ font-size: clamp(44px, 14vw, 72px); letter-spacing: -1.5px; }\n  .svc{ grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }\n  .cs__grid{ grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }\n  .bgrid{ grid-template-columns: 1fr; }\n  .prow, .prow--mp{ grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }\n  .ft__cn{ grid-template-columns: 1fr; }\n  .cform__row{ grid-template-columns: 1fr; }\n  .abstats{ position: static; margin-top: 16px; }\n}\n<\u002Fstyle>\n\n\n<\u002Fhead>\n<body>\n\n<!-- top scroll-progress bar -->\n<div class=\"progress\" aria-hidden=\"true\"><i id=\"progress\"><\u002Fi><\u002Fdiv>\n\n<!-- ===================== HEADER ===================== -->\n<header class=\"hd\" id=\"hd\">\n  <a href=\"#\" class=\"hd__brand\" aria-label=\"Estro Agency home\">\n    <span class=\"hd__logo\" aria-hidden=\"true\">\n      <svg viewBox=\"0 0 36 36\" width=\"32\" height=\"32\">\n        <rect x=\"4\" y=\"8\" width=\"28\" height=\"22\" rx=\"11\" fill=\"var(--C)\"><\u002Frect>\n        <path d=\"M22 8 L28 1 L30 10 Z\" fill=\"var(--C)\"><\u002Fpath>\n        <path d=\"M6 8 L10 1 L12 9 Z\" fill=\"var(--C)\"><\u002Fpath>\n        <ellipse cx=\"14\" cy=\"19\" rx=\"1.6\" ry=\"2.3\" fill=\"var(--K)\"><\u002Fellipse>\n        <ellipse cx=\"22\" cy=\"19\" rx=\"1.6\" ry=\"2.3\" fill=\"var(--K)\"><\u002Fellipse>\n        <path d=\"M16 23 Q18 25 20 23\" stroke=\"var(--K)\" stroke-width=\"1.2\" fill=\"none\" stroke-linecap=\"round\"><\u002Fpath>\n      <\u002Fsvg>\n    <\u002Fspan>\n    <span class=\"hd__name\">\n      <span class=\"hd__nm-1\">estro<\u002Fspan>\n      <span class=\"hd__nm-2\">Agency<\u002Fspan>\n    <\u002Fspan>\n  <\u002Fa>\n  <nav class=\"hd__nav hnav\" aria-label=\"Primary\">\n    <a href=\"#\">Home<\u002Fa>\n    <div class=\"hd__drop\">\n      <button class=\"hd__drop-btn\" type=\"button\">Servizi <span class=\"hd__drop-arrow\">▾<\u002Fspan><\u002Fbutton>\n      <div class=\"hd__drop-panel\">\n        <a href=\"#servizi\">Google ADS<\u002Fa>\n        <a href=\"#servizi\">Social ADS<\u002Fa>\n        <a href=\"#servizi\">Social Media Management<\u002Fa>\n        <a href=\"#servizi\">Influencer Marketing<\u002Fa>\n        <a href=\"#servizi\">Strategia Digitale<\u002Fa>\n        <a href=\"#servizi\">Graphic Design<\u002Fa>\n        <a href=\"#servizi\">Web Design<\u002Fa>\n        <a href=\"#servizi\">Produzione Contenuti<\u002Fa>\n        <a href=\"#servizi\">Modellazione &amp; Renderizzazione 3D<\u002Fa>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n    <a href=\"#case-studies\">Case Studies<\u002Fa>\n    <a href=\"#tips\">News<\u002Fa>\n    <a href=\"#tips\">Tips &amp; Tricks<\u002Fa>\n    <a href=\"#\">Lavora con noi<\u002Fa>\n    <a href=\"#contatti\">Contatti<\u002Fa>\n  <\u002Fnav>\n  <div class=\"hd__cta\">\n    <a href=\"#contatti\" class=\"bf\">Contattaci <span class=\"bf__chev\">›<\u002Fspan><\u002Fa>\n  <\u002Fdiv>\n<\u002Fheader>\n\n<main>\n\n<!-- ===================== HERO ===================== -->\n<section class=\"hero\" data-screen-label=\"01 Hero\">\n  <div class=\"hero__spot\" aria-hidden=\"true\"><\u002Fdiv>\n  <div class=\"hero__dots\" aria-hidden=\"true\"><\u002Fdiv>\n\n  <div class=\"cn hero__cn\">\n    <div class=\"hero__copy rv\">\n      <div class=\"badge\"><span class=\"badge__dot\"><\u002Fspan>AGENZIA CREATIVA · MILANO &amp; VARESE<\u002Fdiv>\n      <h1 class=\"h-hero h-hero--xl\">\n        LE IDEE<br>\n        PRENDONO<br>\n        <em>FORMA.<\u002Fem>\n      <\u002Fh1>\n      <h2 class=\"hero__sub\">Scopri la creatività che lascia il segno.<\u002Fh2>\n      <p class=\"hero__lede\">\n        Mettiamo lo zampino un po' ovunque!<br>\n        Agenzia di comunicazione creativa a Milano.\n      <\u002Fp>\n      <div class=\"hero__cta\">\n        <a href=\"#contatti\" class=\"bf btn-lg\">Contattaci <span class=\"bf__chev\">›<\u002Fspan><\u002Fa>\n        <a href=\"#servizi\" class=\"bo btn-lg\">Scopri i servizi<\u002Fa>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n\n    <div class=\"hero__visual rv d1\">\n      <div class=\"hero__mascot-glow\"><\u002Fdiv>\n      <img class=\"hero__mascot\" src=\"83cdec0b-4496-4005-a8ef-3dd93f97837c\" alt=\"Mascotte Estro — gatto in corsa\">\n\n      <!-- Telemetry lines connecting widgets to the cat -->\n      <svg class=\"reel__play\" type=\"button\" aria-label=\"Play video\">\n          <svg viewBox=\"0 0 96 96\" width=\"96\" height=\"96\">\n            <circle cx=\"48\" cy=\"48\" r=\"46\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"1.6\"><\u002Fcircle>\n            <circle cx=\"48\" cy=\"48\" r=\"40\" fill=\"currentColor\" opacity=\"0.12\"><\u002Fcircle>\n            <path d=\"M38 30 L70 48 L38 66 Z\" fill=\"currentColor\"><\u002Fpath>\n          <\u002Fsvg>\n          <span class=\"reel__play-lbl\">Play Video<\u002Fspan>\n        <\u002Fbutton>\n        <div class=\"reel__hud\">\n          <span><i class=\"reel__rec\"><\u002Fi> REC<\u002Fspan>\n          <span>00:01:42 / 00:02:18<\u002Fspan>\n          <span>4K · 60FPS<\u002Fspan>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n        <div class=\"reel__caption\">SHOWREEL.estro.2025.mp4<\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n  <\u002Fdiv>\n<\u002Fsection>\n\n<!-- ===================== ABOUT (CREAM) ===================== -->\n<section class=\"about\" id=\"about\" data-screen-label=\"04 About\">\n  <!-- decorative cat tail SVG, peeking from left -->\n  <svg class=\"about__tail\" viewBox=\"0 0 360 540\" aria-hidden=\"true\">\n    <path d=\"M 340 30 Q 240 110 280 230 Q 320 350 200 410 Q 80 470 150 540\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"#E0185C\" stroke-width=\"22\" stroke-linecap=\"round\"><\u002Fpath>\n    <path d=\"M 340 30 Q 240 110 280 230 Q 320 350 200 410 Q 80 470 150 540\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"#E0185C\" stroke-width=\"42\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" opacity=\"0.18\"><\u002Fpath>\n  <\u002Fsvg>\n\n  <div class=\"cn about__cn\">\n    <div class=\"about__copy rv\">\n      <div class=\"tag tag--dark\">— About<\u002Fdiv>\n      <h3 class=\"about__kicker\">Siamo curiosi, agili e <span class=\"hl-pink\">pronti a colpire!<\u002Fspan><\u002Fh3>\n      <h2 class=\"h-2 about__title\">\n        Agenzia di comunicazione<br>\n        <em>creativa a Milano.<\u002Fem>\n      <\u002Fh2>\n      <p>\n        Il nostro obiettivo è offrirti <b>soluzioni innovative<\u002Fb> per raggiungere\n        <b>i tuoi obiettivi<\u002Fb>. Siamo specializzati nella <b>creazione di campagne<\u002Fb>\n        di vario tipo: devi aumentare l'<b>awareness del tuo brand<\u002Fb>, creare\n        <b>strategie cross-channel innovative<\u002Fb> per vendere i tuoi prodotti,\n        <b>ingaggiare nuovi ambassador ed influencer<\u002Fb>?\n      <\u002Fp>\n      <p>\n        Mettici alla prova! Creiamo <b>connessioni reali<\u002Fb> con i tuoi nuovi clienti\n        attraverso progetti che lasciano il segno ottenendo <b>risultati concreti e\n        quantificabili<\u002Fb>, divertendoci nel farlo.\n      <\u002Fp>\n      <p>\n        Ogni nostro contenuto, che sia una foto, un video o una stories di 15 secondi\n        nasce per <b>coinvolgere le persone<\u002Fb>. Questo è il punto fermo attorno al\n        quale orbita ogni nostra idea e strategia.\n      <\u002Fp>\n      <a href=\"#\" class=\"bk btn-lg about__btn\">Scarica la brochure <span class=\"bf__chev\">↓<\u002Fspan><\u002Fa>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n\n    <div class=\"about__visual rv d1\">\n      <!-- placeholder photo block -->\n      <div class=\"abphoto\">\n        <div class=\"abphoto__inner\">\n          <span class=\"abphoto__lbl\">teamfoto.studio<\u002Fspan>\n          <svg class=\"abphoto__ico\" viewBox=\"0 0 80 80\" width=\"60\" height=\"60\"><rect x=\"6\" y=\"20\" width=\"68\" height=\"46\" rx=\"3\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"1.6\"><\u002Frect><circle cx=\"40\" cy=\"43\" r=\"14\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"1.6\"><\u002Fcircle><circle cx=\"40\" cy=\"43\" r=\"6\" fill=\"currentColor\"><\u002Fcircle><rect x=\"50\" y=\"14\" width=\"14\" height=\"8\" rx=\"1.5\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"1.6\"><\u002Frect><\u002Fsvg>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n      <div class=\"abstats\">\n        <div class=\"abstat\">\n          <div class=\"abstat__num\">+100<\u002Fdiv>\n          <div class=\"abstat__lbl\">brand seguiti<\u002Fdiv>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n        <div class=\"abstat\">\n          <div class=\"abstat__num\">8<span class=\"abstat__num--pink\">+<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv>\n          <div class=\"abstat__lbl\">anni esperienza<\u002Fdiv>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n        <div class=\"abstat\">\n          <div class=\"abstat__num\">10<\u002Fdiv>\n          <div class=\"abstat__lbl\">servizi<\u002Fdiv>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n  <\u002Fdiv>\n<\u002Fsection>\n\n<!-- <div class=\"post__date\">19 MARZO 2026 · 6 MIN READ<\u002Fdiv>\n          <h3>Il Copywriter crea il messaggio, il Social Media Manager lo guida<\u002Fh3>\n          <p>Due professioni, un unico      <article class=\"post rv d2\">\n        <div class=\"post__th post__th--c\">\n          <span class=\"post__chip\">Web Performance<\u002Fspan>\n          <!-- Photo-like illustration: dashboard / x1=\"0\" x2=\"1\">\n                <stop offset=\"0%\" stop-color=\"#E0185C\"><\u002Fstop>\n                <stop offset=\"55%\" stop-color=\"#E8B44A\"><\u002Fstop>\n                <stop offset=\"100%\" stop-color=\"#4CB450\"><\u002Fstop>\n              <\u002FlinearGradient>\n              <radialGradient id=\"gGlow\" cx=\"50%\" cy=\"55%\">\n                <stop offset=\"0%\" stop-color=\"rgba(76,180,80,0.32)\"><\u002Fstop>\n                <stop offset=\"70%\" stop-color=\"rgba(76,180,80,0)\"><\u002Fstop>\n              <\u002FradialGradient>\n            <\u002Fdefs>\n            <circle cx=\"200\" cy=\"135\" r=\"120\" fill=\"url(#gGlow)\"><\u002Fcircle>\n            <!-- gauge arc background -->\n            <path d=\"M 110 170 A 90 90 0 0 1 290 170\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.12)\" stroke-width=\"18\" stroke-linecap=\"round\"><\u002Fpath>\n            <!-- gauge arc filled -->\n            <path d=\"M 110 170 A 90 90 0 0 1 282 152\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"url(#gGauge)\" stroke-width=\"18\" stroke-linecap=\"round\"><\u002Fpath>\n            <!-- needle -->\n            <g transform=\"translate(200 170) rotate(60)\">\n              <line x1=\"0\" y1=\"0\" x2=\"0\" y2=\"-78\" stroke=\"#F3EFE0\" stroke-width=\"3\" stroke-linecap=\"round\"><\u002Fline>\n              <circle r=\"8\" fill=\"#1C1C1C\" stroke=\"#E0185C\" stroke-width=\"2\"><\u002Fcircle>\n            <\u002Fg>\n            <!-- score text -->\n            <text x=\"200\" y=\"120\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#F3EFE0\" font-family=\"Special Gothic Expanded One, sans-serif\" font-size=\"36\" letter-spacing=\"-1.5\">98<\u002Ftext>\n            <text x=\"200\" y=\"138\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"rgba(243,239,224,0.5)\" font-family=\"JetBrains Mono, monospace\" font-size=\"9\" letter-spacing=\"2\">LIGHTHOUSE<\u002Ftext>\n            <!-- tick labels -->\n            <text x=\"100\" y=\"200\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"rgba(243,239,224,0.5)\" font-family=\"JetBrains Mono, monospace\" font-size=\"9\" letter-spacing=\"1\">LCP<\u002Ftext>\n            <text x=\"200\" y=\"208\" text-anchor=\"middle\"
